description: Runtime path bindings. All scripts MUST read paths from here, NOT hardcode. Override any default by setting the corresponding environment variable before invoking the skill.

docx_skill_root.purpose: Root of the public 'docx' skill. Houses validate.py, unpack.py, pack.py, soffice.py.
docx_skill_root.fallback_hint: git clone the public docx skill and set DOCX_SKILL_ROOT to its absolute path.

outputs_dir.purpose: Where the final .docx is written and where present_files reads from.

uploads_dir.purpose: Where user-supplied data files (CSV, JSON, PDF) are read from.

workdir_root.purpose: Parent for per-job workdirs. Each job uses <workdir_root>/<slug>/ to hold drafts, scorecards, charts, logs.

validate_pdf_outdir.purpose: Where the Validator writes the open-render PDF for Check 2.
